updateNote: Day 59 Midday PT refresh — IDF strikes 7 southern Lebanon towns kill 14 (incl. 2 women, 2 children), wound 37; Israel issues forced evacuation orders. Hezbollah fires rockets at Rab al-Thalathine + drone at Israel. 3 US carriers concurrent in CENTCOM (Lincoln, Ford, Bush) — first since 2003 Iraq invasion; 200+ aircraft, 15,000 personnel. Bloomberg Hormuz Tracker: ship transits down to ~7/24h vs 140 pre-war (95% reduction); CENTCOM redirected 38 ships. Araghchi meets Putin and Lavrov in St. Petersburg — pivot to Russian mediation after Trump cancelled US envoy trip Apr 26. Trump Truth Social 4-day Iran ultimatum: 'May 1 means nothing... we will keep the Strait OPEN.' Khamenei written statement reaffirms Hormuz 'closed by sovereign right.' Brent $108.11 (+35.4%). WTI $96.49. Gas $4.09 AAA. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 12:03 PM PDT April 27, 2026 (Day 59). Next update expected within 12-24 hours.
